title: atlanthemum sanguineum subvar. erectipes
intro: Atlanthemum sanguineum subvar. erectipes, commonly known as the red-flowered atlanthemum or mountain atlanthemum, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties that can help to soothe wounds and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of atlanthemum sanguineum subvar. erectipes include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and support respiratory health, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are often used to treat a range of ailments, from colds and flu to digestive issues and skin problems.
